Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -e "USE dit_territorial; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM territories;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -e "USE dit_territorial; SELECT t.name, s.source, COUNT\(*\) as total FROM signals s JOIN territories t ON s.territoryId=t.id GROUP BY t.name, s.source ORDER BY t.name, total DESC;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -e "USE dit_territorial; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_signals, COUNT\(CASE WHEN llmImpactScore >= 0.7 THEN 1 END\) as high_impact, COUNT\(CASE WHEN llmImpactScore IS NULL THEN 1 END\) as pending_analysis FROM signals;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -e "USE dit_territorial; SELECT source, relatedIndex, LEFT\(title,80\) as title, ROUND\(llmImpactScore,2\) as impact FROM signals WHERE territoryId=1 ORDER BY source, createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe -u root -e "USE dit_territorial; SELECT 'territories' as tabela, COUNT\(*\) as registros FROM territories UNION ALL SELECT 'signals', COUNT\(*\) FROM signals UNION ALL SELECT 'signals_classified', COUNT\(*\) FROM signals WHERE relatedIndex != 'GERAL' UNION ALL SELECT 'stt_scores', COUNT\(*\) FROM stt_scores UNION ALL SELECT 'collection_snapshots', COUNT\(*\) FROM collection_snapshots UNION ALL SELECT 'dashboard_admins', COUNT\(*\) FROM dashboard_admins;")
